H

HardInformations - Class in shot_boxes.informations
Represents a hard-level information box in the game.
HardInformations(String, int) - Constructor for class shot_boxes.informations.HardInformations
Constructs a HardInformations object with the specified informational text and point value.
HardQuestions - Class in shot_boxes.questions
Represents a hard-level question box that appears in the game.
HardQuestions(String, int) - Constructor for class shot_boxes.questions.HardQuestions
Constructs a HardQuestions object with the given question and point value.
hasInfo - Variable in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
 
hasQuestion - Variable in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
 
home - package home
 
Home - Class in home
Manages the current player instance and controls transitions between different game levels.
Home() - Constructor for class home.Home
 
homeGUI - Static variable in class main.MainGUI
 
HomeGUI - Class in home
Displays the current user's image and username, and provides buttons to start the game, view the scoreboard, or logout.
HomeGUI() - Constructor for class home.HomeGUI
Constructs the Home screen panel with buttons and user info.
